name: python3-humanize
title: python3-humanize
description:
Python Humanize library (Python 3)
This library proposes various common humanization utilities, like turning
a number into a fuzzy human readable duration ('3 minutes ago') or into a
human readable size or throughput.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-humanize because Python Humanize library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-humanize as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-humanize with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-humanize --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
